title: Tactical Op Drops Anti-Fog and Lens Cleaning Kit Emergency Survival - .25 oz
description:
Defog and clean eyewear, lenses and optics with Op Drops Anti-Fog and Lens Cleaner. Use this concentrated, gentle and alcohol-free formula on binoculars, sunglasses, scopes, helmet visors, goggles and eye shields. Wipe with the included microfiber cleaning cloth/carrying pouch for clear vision that lasts. Lenses will be clean, clear and protected against fogging during any outdoor activity or adventure.

Tactical Op Drops Anti-Fog and Lens Cleaning Kit Emergency Survival - .25 oz

Defog and clean eyewear, lenses and optics with Op Drops Anti-Fog and Lens Cleaner. Use this concentrated, gentle and alcohol-free formula on binoculars, sunglasses, scopes, helmet visors, goggles and eye shields. Wipe with the included microfiber cleaning cloth/carrying pouch for clear vision that lasts. Lenses will be clean, clear and protected against fogging during any outdoor activity or adventure.

Key Features

  • Get clear vision with this all-in-one anti-fog and lens cleaning system for all types of eyewear including optics, binoculars, and face masks
  • Keep lenses and optics fog-free for hours with just one concentrated drop from a 0.25 oz bottle
  • Defog dry lenses, goggles and eye shields for any activity; includes microfiber cloth and storage bag
  • Use this non-toxic and alcohol-free without worrying as it won’t harm eyes or lenses
  • Packaging may vary
